title: PolyRig feature_list.json
description: Plan-as-state feature list generated into target projects (and used by the PolyRig repo itself). Each feature moves through the state machine planned -> in_progress -> (blocked) -> implemented -> verified, plus rejected. Hard rules: update after every implementation attempt; never set 'verified' unless verification commands passed or manual verification is explicitly documented.

$comment.description: Free-form usage note carried inside the instance file.

version.description: Version of the plan/project this feature list belongs to, e.g. '0.1.0'.

generated_at.description: Date (YYYY-MM-DD) the feature list was generated.

features.description: The features, each carrying its own persistent state.

status.description: Current state in the feature state machine: planned -> in_progress -> (blocked) -> implemented -> verified, plus rejected.

depends_on.description: Ids of features that must reach at least 'implemented' before this one starts.

pack_refs.description: Ids of packs whose knowledge this feature draws on (routes the agent to docs/stacks/<id>/ and docs/domains/<id>/).

acceptance_criteria.description: Concrete, checkable criteria the implementation must satisfy.

verification.description: Verification route for the feature. 'verified' status requires the automated commands to pass or the manual checks to be explicitly documented.

automated.description: Shell commands that must exit 0, e.g. './gradlew test'.

files_expected.description: Repo-relative paths the implementation is expected to create or modify.

notes.description: Free-form notes: blockers, manual-verification evidence, deviations.
